query: I edited my ElevenLabs agent's system prompt and pushed it via the API, but when I test the agent in the dashboard it still shows the old prompt. What's going on and how do I make it take effect?
expected_behavior: explain draft vs saved vs what-a-conversation-uses are three different states
identify the dashboard is showing a stale draft/cached view while the API GET already has the change
tell the user to hard-reload (F5) the dashboard and trust GET /agents/{id} as source of truth
note the widget caches config at page load so a live conversation needs a page reload too
notes: Guards against the #1 'my change didn't take' confusion. Baseline model only vaguely guessed 'draft/publish' without the cache/F5/GET-source-of-truth specifics.
